description: SDXL 1.0 + Papercut LoRA (TheLastBen) — paper-cut / scherenschnitt craft style
_comment: SDXL LoRA trained by TheLastBen using fast-stable-diffusion SDXL trainer. Renders subjects in a decorative paper-cut / scherenschnitt craft aesthetic.
_comment_trigger: TRIGGER WORD: prepend 'papercut' before the subject. Format: 'papercut <subject/scene>'. Example: 'papercut forest with deer'.
_comment_steps: SDXL default range 30–50 steps. 30 is sufficient for LoRA styles.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7.5 is a safe SDXL default.
_comment_lora_scale: 0.9 is a safe default. 1.0 gives maximum papercut effect.
_comment_offload: Enable on ≤16 GB unified memory to avoid OOM.
